metadata.name: Manage Dual Sourcing for an API

description: A supply chain manager needs to manage the supply of a critical API from two different qualified suppliers to mitigate risk.

nodes.task_description: Review the demand forecast and the current inventory levels for the API.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the total required API for the next quarter.

nodes.task_description: Allocate the required volume between the two suppliers according to the sourcing strategy (e.g., 70% from primary, 30% from secondary).

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the quantity to be ordered from each supplier.

nodes.task_description: Issue purchase orders to both suppliers for the allocated quantities.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates two separate purchase orders.

nodes.task_description: Track the shipments from both suppliers to ensure on-time delivery.

expected_outcome.value: Agent monitors the status of both orders in the procurement system.
